author: phase-4-coordinator
content:
Added trybuild-based compile-fail tests for all error paths in ferray-core-macros. New dev-dependency trybuild = 1.0. Tests live in ferray-core-macros/tests/compile_fail/ with a harness in tests/trybuild.rs.

6 compile-fail fixtures cover:
- FerrayRecord without #[repr(C)] → 'FerrayRecord requires #[repr(C)] on the struct'
- FerrayRecord on an enum → 'FerrayRecord can only be derived for structs'
- FerrayRecord on a tuple struct → 'only supports structs with named fields'
- FerrayRecord on a unit struct → same diagnostic as tuple struct path
- promoted_type!(T) (wrong arg count) → 'expects exactly two type arguments'
- promoted_type!(Unknown, f64) → 'cannot promote types'

Each fixture has a companion .stderr file that pins the exact compiler diagnostic, so message drift is surfaced in review. Regenerate via TRYBUILD=overwrite cargo test -p ferray-core-macros --test trybuild. Both trybuild test functions pass. Clippy clean.
